description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Aura sandal embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed floaters with an upraised heel and forefoot strap and ankle loopFoamy rubber footbedTPU outsole with multidirectional lugs and circular nubsOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the forefoot to act as a toe guardMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
